frameworks.name: exploration-exploitation dilemma
frameworks.one_line: Choice between sampling information and exploiting known value.

frameworks.name: reinforcement learning
frameworks.one_line: Framework in which exploration-exploitation is a core problem.

frameworks.name: evidence accumulation
frameworks.one_line: Subjects observe until a critical evidence threshold triggers betting.

core_question: Can neural correlates of pure exploration be disentangled from those of pure exploitation in the human brain?
key_assumptions: Observing trials index pure exploration, betting trials index pure exploitation
Subjects accumulate evidence to a threshold before switching to exploit
manipulations: Trial type: observe (information sampling) vs bet (value exploitation)
key_findings: Insula and dorsal anterior cingulate cortex more active on observe than bet trials
Ventromedial prefrontal cortex tracks model-derived evidence accumulation
interpretations: Insula and dACC drive exploratory behaviour, vmPFC supports the evidence-to-threshold readout
